description: A user reports their computer has become very slow and unresponsive over the last few days.

nodes.task_description: Use the RMM tool to check the computer's performance metrics (CPU, RAM, Disk usage).

expected_outcome.value: The technician finds that RAM usage is consistently at 99%.

nodes.task_description: Check the list of running processes to identify the application consuming the most memory.

expected_outcome.value: A specific web browser with many open tabs is identified as the cause.

nodes.task_description: Advise the user to close unnecessary browser tabs and restart their computer to resolve the issue.

expected_outcome.value: The user's computer performance returns to normal.
